module:
Linguistic-aware chunking strategy.

This module provides a chunking strategy that uses linguistic analysis
to identify natural boundaries in text.

LinguisticChunkingStrategy.docstring:
Strategy that chunks text based on linguistic analysis.
    
    This strategy uses a boundary provider to identify natural
    boundaries in text and respects these boundaries when creating chunks.

__init__.docstring:
Initialize the linguistic chunking strategy.
        
        Args:
            provider_name: Name of the boundary provider to use
            boundary_types: Types of boundaries to detect
            max_tokens: Maximum tokens per chunk
            **kwargs: Additional configuration options

chunk_text.docstring:
Divide text into chunks that respect linguistic boundaries.
        
        Args:
            text: Input text to chunk
            max_tokens: Maximum tokens per chunk (overrides instance setting)
            
        Returns:
            List of chunk dictionaries
